title: Babbitt
author: Sinclair Lewis
content: “I've never done a single thing I've really wanted to in my whole life!”

title: A Streetcar Named Desire
author: Tennessee Williams
content: “I don't want realism. I want magic!”

title: Go Tell It on the Mountain
author: James Baldwin
content: “For the Lord was in the world, and He was in the fire.”

title: Blood Meridian
author: Cormac McCarthy
content: “Whatever in creation exists without my knowledge exists without my consent.”
action: Expand the reach of your agency.
